---
title: "ex-situ oxidation rates"
format: html
editor: visual
author: Vojtech Tlaskal
email: vojtech.tlaskal@bc.cas.cz
date: 2026-05-15
---

Script for processing ex-situ oxidation data and calculation of oxidation rates (Table S10).

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidylog)
library(readr)

# read modified input and keep rows for kinetics
trace_gas_oxidation <- read_tsv("ex_situ_oxidation_data.tsv")

# show groups
groups <- distinct(trace_gas_oxidation, group) %>% 
  print

# model fitting
lm_summary_by_group <- trace_gas_oxidation %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
    m <- lm(nmol_l ~ time, data = .x)
    bind_cols(
      broom::tidy(m)  %>% filter(term == "time") %>%
        select(slope = estimate, std_error = std.error, t_stat = statistic, p_value = p.value),
      broom::glance(m) %>% select(r_squared = r.squared)
    )
  }) %>%
  arrange(group) %>% 
  print

# model fitting - first order kinetics (ln-transformed)
lm_summary_by_group_first <- trace_gas_oxidation %>%
  mutate(ln_nmol_l = log(nmol_l)) %>% # for the first order
  group_by(group) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
    m <- lm(ln_nmol_l ~ time, data = .x)
    bind_cols(
      broom::tidy(m)  %>% filter(term == "time") %>%
        select(slope = estimate, std_error = std.error, t_stat = statistic, p_value = p.value),
      broom::glance(m) %>% select(r_squared = r.squared)
    )
  }) %>%
  arrange(group) %>%
  print

#write_tsv(distinct(trace_gas_oxidation, group), "distinct_group.tsv")

group_levels <- c(
  # transect 1
  "1_unwarmed_13_CO","1_unwarmed_13_H2","1_unwarmed_13_CH4",
  "1_unwarmed_19_CO","1_unwarmed_19_H2","1_unwarmed_19_CH4",
  "1_warmed_19_CO","1_warmed_19_H2","1_warmed_19_CH4",
  # transect 2
  "2_unwarmed_13_CO","2_unwarmed_13_H2","2_unwarmed_13_CH4",
  "2_unwarmed_19_CO","2_unwarmed_19_H2","2_unwarmed_19_CH4",
  "2_warmed_19_CO","2_warmed_19_H2","2_warmed_19_CH4",
  # transect 4
  "4_unwarmed_13_CO","4_unwarmed_13_H2","4_unwarmed_13_CH4",
  "4_unwarmed_19_CO","4_unwarmed_19_H2","4_unwarmed_19_CH4",
  "4_warmed_19_CO","4_warmed_19_H2","4_warmed_19_CH4",
  # transect 5
  "5_unwarmed_13_CO","5_unwarmed_13_H2","5_unwarmed_13_CH4",
  "5_unwarmed_19_CO","5_unwarmed_19_H2","5_unwarmed_19_CH4",
  "5_warmed_19_CO","5_warmed_19_H2","5_warmed_19_CH4"
)

# Build a named label vector
group_labels <- unique(trace_gas_oxidation$group) %>%
  setNames(., .) %>%
  str_replace("^(\\d+)_.*_(H2|CO|CH4)$", "\\1~\\2") %>%  # keep only number + gas
  str_replace("H2",  "H[2]") %>%
  str_replace("CH4", "CH[4]") %>%
  { setNames(., unique(trace_gas_oxidation$group)) }       

# plot
model_data <- lm_summary_by_group %>% select(group, slope, r2 = r_squared)
model_data_first <- lm_summary_by_group_first %>% select(group, slope, r2 = r_squared) %>% 
  mutate(group = factor(group, levels = group_levels))

palette <- c("unwarmed_13" = "#66C2A5", "unwarmed_19" = "#8DA0CB", "warmed_19" = "#FC8D62")

# load plot for first order kinetics
gg_plot_all <- trace_gas_oxidation %>%
  mutate(
    colour_group = str_extract(group, "(?<=\\d_)(unwarmed_13|unwarmed_19|warmed_19)"),
    ln_nmol_l    = log(nmol_l)
  ) %>%
  mutate(group = factor(group, levels = group_levels)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = time, y = ln_nmol_l, colour = colour_group)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(
    method    = "lm",
    se        = FALSE,
    colour    = "grey50",
    linewidth = 0.8,
    linetype  = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = model_data_first,
    aes(x = Inf, y = Inf, label = sprintf("slope = %.3f\nR² = %.3f", slope, r2)),
    hjust = 1.05, vjust = 1.05, size = 3.5, colour = "black",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = palette,
    name   = "",
    labels = c("unwarmed_13" = "Unwarmed",
               "unwarmed_19" = "Short-term warmed",
               "warmed_19"   = "Long-term warmed")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ group, ncol = 9, labeller = as_labeller(group_labels, label_parsed), scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    x = "Time (h)",
    y = "Gas concentration [ln(nmol L⁻¹)]"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +                              
  theme(
    # Facet strip
    strip.text        = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "darkslategray", size = 12),

    # Axis text (tick labels) and titles
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title        = element_text(size = 16),

    # Tick marks
    axis.ticks        = element_line(colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.1),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(4, "pt"),

    # Major grid
   panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "grey96", linewidth = 0.25), 
    panel.grid.minor  = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),

    # Legend
    legend.position   = "bottom",
    legend.text       = element_text(size = 16)
  )

gg_plot_all

```
